title: FLAG-MODEL B1: workshop draft gains a flags channel (preserved across the chain, skipped by flatten)
description: The workshop draft (_EMPTY_DRAFT, prompt-workshop/dispatch/_workshop.py:215-243) has 15 top-level keys (meta/plan/milestones/.../responsibilities) and NO annotation channel. Add a top-level flags channel. Two threading requirements: (1) the 14 MERGE_RULES (apply.py:51-215) each mutate one draft section and none touch flags - they must PRESERVE accumulated flags across the immutable draft-after-<spec>.json chain (e.g. a setdefault(flags,[]) guard at the apply entry, or per-rule preservation); (2) flatten_draft_for_grounding (_workshop.py:466-584) must SKIP flags from the production draft_state projection exactly as it already skips meta (:577-582) - flags are workshop/review annotation, not a form field collectDraftState emits. Atomic gap; pairs with B2.
impact: The workshop draft has no annotation channel, so flags cannot accumulate across the 14-spec draft-after chain.
proposed_resolution: Add a top-level flags channel to _EMPTY_DRAFT; MERGE_RULES preserve it across the chain; flatten_draft_for_grounding skips it (as it skips meta).
